top_signals.title: Switzerland Looks to Have Rejected 10-Million Population Cap
top_signals.summary: Switzerland rejected capping its population at 10 million people, a radical proposal that would have marked an escalation in efforts by wealthy nations around the world to put strict curbs on immigration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Speech of the Executive Vice-President Teresa Ribera at the Politecnico di Torino Foresight & Innovation International Award 2026
top_signals.summary: European Commission Speech Brussels, 12 Jun 2026 Speech of the Executive Vice-President Teresa Ribera after receiving the PoliTO Foresight & Innovation International Award 2026 in Torino
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
